package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_method_combines_unrelated_write_paths_via_action_string: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services that branch on action strings to implement many create, update, or delete variants in one method.
type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionString(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO) error {
    focus := "service_method_combines_unrelated_write"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative := map[string]int{"service": 1, "method": 2, "combines": 3, "unrelated": 4, "write": 5, "paths": 6}
    service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_negative_0 := CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_0
    method_negative_1 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["method"] + len(input)
    _ = method_negative_1
    combines_negative_2 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["combines"] + len(input)
    _ = combines_negative_2
    unrelated_negative_3 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["unrelated"] + len(input)
    _ = unrelated_negative_3
    write_negative_4 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_negative_4
    paths_negative_5 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_negative["paths"] + len(input)
    _ = paths_negative_5
    return nil
}
